# GitHub Copilot Instructions

This is the SafeX Solutions Summer Internship portfolio repository for Group 54.

Use `AGENTS.md` as the main harness. The supporting docs are:

- `docs/project-brief.md`
- `docs/team-roster.md`
- `docs/weekly-task-log.md`
- `docs/agent-memory.md`
- `docs/review-checklist.md`

Repository expectations:

- Keep week workspaces independent: `week1/` and `week2/`.
- Keep Week 2 module work inside the assigned folder under `week2/src/modules/`.
- Preserve existing member work unless the requested change targets it.
- Do not add private contact details to docs or code.
- Use typed, idiomatic Python.
- Keep Streamlit module UI inside `render_ui()` in each module `ui.py`.
- Keep page setup in `week2/src/app.py`.
- Keep `week2/src/modules/registry.py` aligned with visible modules.
- Add or update focused tests when behavior changes.
- Update `docs/agent-memory.md` for durable project facts and unresolved questions.
